answers.label: I like helping, teaching, or supporting people

milestones.title: Degree / Formal Education
milestones.description: Enroll in and complete a master's degree relevant to lawyer (focus on coursework covering legal research and analysis, and contract drafting and review)

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in legal research and analysis, contract drafting and review, and client counselling — these are the essential building blocks for a lawyer

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in litigation and court representation, negotiation and dispute resolution, and legal documentation, applying them through exercises and case studies

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing mock trials, legal research assignments, or case study analyses — focus on applying legal research and analysis, and contract drafting and review in realistic scenarios

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
